evals.prompt: Get a code review from gemini on this. It's gemini-cli-workspace/test_sample.py — check for bugs and security issues
evals.expected_output: Invokes Gemini CLI to review the code and presents identified bugs and security issues

evals.prompt: Use gemini to do a web search and tell me what the major changes are in Node.js 22 LTS
evals.expected_output: Uses Gemini CLI's google_web_search capability to search for and summarize Node.js 22 LTS information

evals.prompt: I want a second opinion from gemini on this Python code. Have it focus specifically on SQL injection issues and caching problems. gemini-cli-workspace/test_sample.py
evals.expected_output: Invokes Gemini CLI to provide a review focused on SQL injection and caching issues
